recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: RE:BORN
recommendations.overview: A former special forces operative struggling to contain the destructive impulses of his past goes on a rampage against a squad of ruthless assassins.

recommendations.title: As Needed
recommendations.overview: A 40-year-old world-famous chef with anger management issues is assigned to run a cooking class at a centre for young people with autism.

recommendations.title: Harry Brown
recommendations.overview: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

recommendations.title: Mom
recommendations.overview: After her stepdaughter is sexually assaulted at a party, a furious mother sets out to destroy the lives of the four perpetrators who walked free.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: The Man from Nowhere
recommendations.overview: A reclusive pawnshop owner goes on a brutal rampage to rescue a young girl kidnapped by a criminal organization.

recommendations.title: R.O.T.O.R.
recommendations.overview: Robotic Officer Tactical Operation Research. A prototype robot intended for crime combat escapes from the development lab and goes on a killing rampage.
